## Welcome to CivicLens — Here's What You Can Do

CivicLens is your AI-powered gateway to Lake Forest community infrastructure. Here's how to get started:

### Report an Issue
See a pothole, broken sidewalk, or streetlight out? Click **"Report an Issue"** on the home screen. Our AI wizard walks you through it in seconds.

### Track a Request
Already reported something? Open the **Service Portal** and enter your tracking number to see real-time status updates.

### Explore the Map
Click **"Explor
